description: Detect statistical outliers using various methods (zscore, iqr, modified_zscore)

variations.name: Z-score outlier detection for single column
variations.example:
anomaly_pipe = AnomalyPipe.from_dataframe(data)
anomaly_pipe = anomaly_pipe | detect_statistical_outliers(
    columns='temperature',
    method='zscore',
    threshold=3.0
)

variations.name: IQR outlier detection for multiple columns
variations.example:
anomaly_pipe = AnomalyPipe.from_dataframe(data)
anomaly_pipe = anomaly_pipe | detect_statistical_outliers(
    columns=['pressure', 'humidity', 'temperature'],
    method='iqr',
    threshold=1.5
)

variations.name: Modified Z-score with rolling window
variations.example:
anomaly_pipe = AnomalyPipe.from_dataframe(data)
anomaly_pipe = anomaly_pipe | detect_statistical_outliers(
    columns='sensor_reading',
    method='modified_zscore',
    threshold=3.5,
    window=50,
    time_column='timestamp'
)

variations.name: Grouped outlier detection by device
variations.example:
anomaly_pipe = AnomalyPipe.from_dataframe(data)
anomaly_pipe = anomaly_pipe | detect_statistical_outliers(
    columns='sensor_value',
    method='modified_zscore',
    threshold=3.0,
    group_columns=['device_id', 'sensor_type'],
    time_column='reading_time'
)

variations.name: Network traffic anomaly detection
variations.example:
anomaly_pipe = AnomalyPipe.from_dataframe(data)
anomaly_pipe = anomaly_pipe | detect_statistical_outliers(
    columns=['bytes_in', 'bytes_out', 'packet_count'],
    method='iqr',
    threshold=2.0,
    window=100,
    time_column='timestamp'
)

description: Detect contextual anomalies considering time series patterns and seasonality

variations.name: Residual-based anomaly detection with EWM
variations.example:
anomaly_pipe = AnomalyPipe.from_dataframe(data)
anomaly_pipe = anomaly_pipe | detect_contextual_anomalies(
    columns='page_views',
    time_column='hour',
    method='residual',
    model_type='ewm',
    threshold=2.5,
    window=24
)

variations.name: SARIMAX seasonal anomaly detection
variations.example:
anomaly_pipe = AnomalyPipe.from_dataframe(data)
anomaly_pipe = anomaly_pipe | detect_contextual_anomalies(
    columns='daily_revenue',
    time_column='date',
    method='prediction_interval',
    model_type='sarimax',
    threshold=2.0,
    window=60,
    seasonal_period=7
)

variations.name: Change point detection in system metrics
variations.example:
anomaly_pipe = AnomalyPipe.from_dataframe(data)
anomaly_pipe = anomaly_pipe | detect_contextual_anomalies(
    columns='cpu_utilization',
    time_column='timestamp',
    method='changepoint',
    model_type='ewm',
    threshold=3.0,
    window=100
)

variations.name: Grouped seasonal anomaly detection by region
variations.example:
anomaly_pipe = AnomalyPipe.from_dataframe(data)
anomaly_pipe = anomaly_pipe | detect_contextual_anomalies(
    columns='quarterly_revenue',
    time_column='quarter',
    method='residual',
    model_type='sarimax',
    seasonal_period=4,
    group_columns=['region'],
    threshold=2.0
)

variations.name: High-frequency trading anomaly detection
variations.example:
anomaly_pipe = AnomalyPipe.from_dataframe(data)
anomaly_pipe = anomaly_pipe | detect_contextual_anomalies(
    columns='trade_volume',
    time_column='trade_timestamp',
    method='prediction_interval',
    model_type='ewm',
    window=1000,
    threshold=3.0,
    datetime_format='%Y-%m-%d %H:%M:%S.%f'
)

description: Detect multivariate anomalies using machine learning methods

variations.name: Isolation Forest for server metrics
variations.example:
anomaly_pipe = AnomalyPipe.from_dataframe(data)
anomaly_pipe = anomaly_pipe | detect_collective_anomalies(
    columns=['cpu_usage', 'memory_usage', 'disk_io', 'network_traffic'],
    time_column='timestamp',
    method='isolation_forest',
    window=200,
    contamination=0.05,
    n_estimators=100
)

variations.name: Local Outlier Factor for sensor data
variations.example:
anomaly_pipe = AnomalyPipe.from_dataframe(data)
anomaly_pipe = anomaly_pipe | detect_collective_anomalies(
    columns=['temperature', 'pressure', 'vibration', 'current'],
    time_column='timestamp',
    method='lof',
    window=150,
    contamination=0.03
)

variations.name: Equipment failure detection with grouping
variations.example:
anomaly_pipe = AnomalyPipe.from_dataframe(data)
anomaly_pipe = anomaly_pipe | detect_collective_anomalies(
    columns=['vibration_x', 'vibration_y', 'vibration_z', 'temperature'],
    time_column='timestamp',
    method='isolation_forest',
    contamination=0.02,
    window=300,
    group_columns=['equipment_id']
)

variations.name: One-Class SVM for financial data
variations.example:
anomaly_pipe = AnomalyPipe.from_dataframe(data)
anomaly_pipe = anomaly_pipe | detect_collective_anomalies(
    columns=['price', 'volume', 'volatility', 'rsi'],
    time_column='timestamp',
    method='one_class_svm',
    window=100,
    contamination=0.01
)

variations.name: DBSCAN clustering for user behavior
variations.example:
anomaly_pipe = AnomalyPipe.from_dataframe(data)
anomaly_pipe = anomaly_pipe | detect_collective_anomalies(
    columns=['session_duration', 'page_views', 'clicks', 'bounce_rate'],
    time_column='timestamp',
    method='dbscan',
    window=50,
    contamination=0.1
)

description: Calculate seasonal residuals by decomposing time series into trend, seasonal, and residual components

variations.name: Monthly sales seasonal decomposition
variations.example:
anomaly_pipe = AnomalyPipe.from_dataframe(data)
anomaly_pipe = anomaly_pipe | calculate_seasonal_residuals(
    columns='monthly_sales',
    mtime_column='month',
    mseasonal_period=12,
    mmethod='multiplicative'
)

variations.name: Daily traffic decomposition with weekly seasonality
variations.example:
anomaly_pipe = AnomalyPipe.from_dataframe(data)
anomaly_pipe = anomaly_pipe | calculate_seasonal_residuals(
    columns='daily_visitors',
    mtime_column='date',
    mseasonal_period=7,
    mmethod='additive'
)

variations.name: Quarterly revenue decomposition
variations.example:
anomaly_pipe = AnomalyPipe.from_dataframe(data)
anomaly_pipe = anomaly_pipe | calculate_seasonal_residuals(
    columns='quarterly_revenue',
    mtime_column='quarter',
    mseasonal_period=4,
    mmethod='multiplicative'
)

variations.name: Hourly energy consumption with daily seasonality
variations.example:
anomaly_pipe = AnomalyPipe.from_dataframe(data)
anomaly_pipe = anomaly_pipe | calculate_seasonal_residuals(
    columns='energy_consumption',
    mtime_column='hour',
    mseasonal_period=24,
    mmethod='additive'
)

variations.name: Grouped seasonal decomposition by region
variations.example:
anomaly_pipe = AnomalyPipe.from_dataframe(data)
anomaly_pipe = anomaly_pipe | calculate_seasonal_residuals(
    columns='sales',
    mtime_column='date',
    mseasonal_period=12,
    mmethod='multiplicative',
    mgroup_columns=['region']
)

description: Detect anomalies in residual data after seasonal decomposition

variations.name: Detect anomalies in revenue residuals
variations.example:
anomaly_pipe = AnomalyPipe.from_dataframe(data)
anomaly_pipe = anomaly_pipe | calculate_seasonal_residuals('revenue', 'date', 12, 'multiplicative')
anomaly_pipe = anomaly_pipe | detect_anomalies_from_residuals(
    columns='revenue',
    method='modified_zscore',
    threshold=3.0,
    suffix='_residual',
    output_suffix='_anomaly'
)

variations.name: Detect anomalies in stock price residuals
variations.example:
anomaly_pipe = AnomalyPipe.from_dataframe(data)
anomaly_pipe = anomaly_pipe | calculate_seasonal_residuals('stock_price', 'date', 252, 'additive')
anomaly_pipe = anomaly_pipe | detect_anomalies_from_residuals(
    columns='stock_price',
    method='iqr',
    threshold=2.0,
    suffix='_residual'
)

variations.name: Detect anomalies in website traffic residuals
variations.example:
anomaly_pipe = AnomalyPipe.from_dataframe(data)
anomaly_pipe = anomaly_pipe | calculate_seasonal_residuals('daily_visitors', 'date', 7, 'additive')
anomaly_pipe = anomaly_pipe | detect_anomalies_from_residuals(
    columns='daily_visitors',
    method='zscore',
    threshold=2.5,
    suffix='_residual',
    output_suffix='_traffic_anomaly'
)

variations.name: Detect anomalies in multiple residual columns
variations.example:
anomaly_pipe = AnomalyPipe.from_dataframe(data)
anomaly_pipe = anomaly_pipe | calculate_seasonal_residuals(['sales', 'profit'], 'date', 12, 'multiplicative')
anomaly_pipe = anomaly_pipe | detect_anomalies_from_residuals(
    columns=['sales', 'profit'],
    method='modified_zscore',
    threshold=3.0,
    suffix='_residual'
)

description: Detect structural breaks and change points in time series data

variations.name: Binary segmentation for financial returns
variations.example:
anomaly_pipe = AnomalyPipe.from_dataframe(data)
anomaly_pipe = anomaly_pipe | detect_change_points(
    columns='stock_returns',
    time_column='trading_date',
    min_size=30,
    method='binary_segmentation',
    penalty='bic'
)

variations.name: Window-based change point detection
variations.example:
anomaly_pipe = AnomalyPipe.from_dataframe(data)
anomaly_pipe = anomaly_pipe | detect_change_points(
    columns='daily_active_users',
    time_column='date',
    min_size=14,
    method='window',
    penalty='aic'
)

variations.name: Pelt algorithm for system performance
variations.example:
anomaly_pipe = AnomalyPipe.from_dataframe(data)
anomaly_pipe = anomaly_pipe | detect_change_points(
    columns='response_time',
    time_column='timestamp',
    min_size=20,
    method='pelt',
    penalty='bic'
)

variations.name: Grouped change point detection by region
variations.example:
anomaly_pipe = AnomalyPipe.from_dataframe(data)
anomaly_pipe = anomaly_pipe | detect_change_points(
    columns='sales',
    time_column='date',
    min_size=25,
    method='binary_segmentation',
    penalty='aic',
    group_columns=['region']
)

variations.name: Change point detection with datetime format
variations.example:
anomaly_pipe = AnomalyPipe.from_dataframe(data)
anomaly_pipe = anomaly_pipe | detect_change_points(
    columns='temperature',
    time_column='datetime',
    min_size=50,
    method='window',
    penalty='bic',
    datetime_format='%Y-%m-%d %H:%M:%S'
)

description: Generate forecasts and detect anomalies based on prediction intervals

variations.name: ARIMA forecasting with anomaly detection
variations.example:
anomaly_pipe = AnomalyPipe.from_dataframe(data)
anomaly_pipe = anomaly_pipe | forecast_and_detect_anomalies(
    columns='energy_consumption',
    time_column='timestamp',
    forecast_periods=30,
    model='arima',
    threshold=2.5
)

variations.name: Exponential smoothing with seasonal forecasting
variations.example:
anomaly_pipe = AnomalyPipe.from_dataframe(data)
anomaly_pipe = anomaly_pipe | forecast_and_detect_anomalies(
    columns='weekly_sales',
    time_column='week',
    forecast_periods=12,
    model='exponential_smoothing',
    seasonal_period=52,
    threshold=2.0
)

variations.name: Prophet forecasting for business metrics
variations.example:
anomaly_pipe = AnomalyPipe.from_dataframe(data)
anomaly_pipe = anomaly_pipe | forecast_and_detect_anomalies(
    columns='daily_revenue',
    time_column='date',
    forecast_periods=90,
    model='prophet',
    threshold=2.0
)

variations.name: LSTM neural network forecasting
variations.example:
anomaly_pipe = AnomalyPipe.from_dataframe(data)
anomaly_pipe = anomaly_pipe | forecast_and_detect_anomalies(
    columns='stock_price',
    time_column='date',
    forecast_periods=20,
    model='lstm',
    threshold=2.5
)

variations.name: Grouped forecasting by category
variations.example:
anomaly_pipe = AnomalyPipe.from_dataframe(data)
anomaly_pipe = anomaly_pipe | forecast_and_detect_anomalies(
    columns='demand',
    time_column='date',
    forecast_periods=30,
    model='arima',
    threshold=2.0,
    group_columns=['product_category']
)

description: Apply multiple anomaly detection methods and combine results using ensemble methods

variations.name: Majority voting ensemble
Weighted ensemble with multiple methods
Any consensus ensemble
All consensus ensemble

description: Get summary statistics of detected anomalies

variations.name: Get summary of last analysis
variations.example:
anomaly_pipe = AnomalyPipe.from_dataframe(data)
anomaly_pipe = anomaly_pipe | detect_statistical_outliers('temperature', 'zscore', 3.0)
summary = get_anomaly_summary()(anomaly_pipe)

variations.name: Get summary of specific analysis
variations.example:
anomaly_pipe = AnomalyPipe.from_dataframe(data)
anomaly_pipe = anomaly_pipe | detect_contextual_anomalies('sales', 'date', 'residual', 'sarimax')
summary = get_anomaly_summary(analysis_name='contextual_anomalies_residual_sarimax')(anomaly_pipe)

description: Get the most severe anomalies by score

variations.name: Get top 10 anomalies
variations.example:
anomaly_pipe = AnomalyPipe.from_dataframe(data)
anomaly_pipe = anomaly_pipe | detect_statistical_outliers('temperature', 'zscore', 3.0)
top_anomalies = get_top_anomalies(n=10, time_column='timestamp')(anomaly_pipe)

variations.name: Get top 5 anomalies from specific analysis
variations.example:
anomaly_pipe = AnomalyPipe.from_dataframe(data)
anomaly_pipe = anomaly_pipe | batch_detect_anomalies('sensor_data', [{'name': 'statistical_outliers', 'params': {'columns': 'sensor_data', 'method': 'zscore'}}])
top_anomalies = get_top_anomalies(n=5, analysis_name='ensemble_anomalies_majority')(anomaly_pipe)

variations.name: Get top 20 anomalies without time column
variations.example:
anomaly_pipe = AnomalyPipe.from_dataframe(data)
anomaly_pipe = anomaly_pipe | detect_collective_anomalies(['cpu', 'memory'], 'timestamp', 'isolation_forest')
top_anomalies = get_top_anomalies(n=20)(anomaly_pipe)

description: Convert anomaly detection results to DataFrame

variations.name: Convert last analysis to DataFrame
variations.example:
anomaly_pipe = AnomalyPipe.from_dataframe(data)
anomaly_pipe = anomaly_pipe | detect_statistical_outliers('temperature', 'zscore', 3.0)
result_df = anomaly_pipe.to_df()

variations.name: Convert specific analysis with metadata
variations.example:
anomaly_pipe = AnomalyPipe.from_dataframe(data)
anomaly_pipe = anomaly_pipe | detect_contextual_anomalies('sales', 'date', 'residual', 'sarimax')
result_df = anomaly_pipe.to_df(analysis_name='contextual_anomalies_residual_sarimax', include_metadata=True)

variations.name: Convert without original data
variations.example:
anomaly_pipe = AnomalyPipe.from_dataframe(data)
anomaly_pipe = anomaly_pipe | detect_collective_anomalies(['cpu', 'memory'], 'timestamp', 'isolation_forest')
result_df = anomaly_pipe.to_df(include_original=False)

description: Merge anomaly detection results into base dataframe

variations.name: Merge last analysis results
variations.example:
anomaly_pipe = AnomalyPipe.from_dataframe(data)
anomaly_pipe = anomaly_pipe | detect_statistical_outliers('temperature', 'zscore', 3.0)
merged_df = anomaly_pipe.merge_to_df(original_data)

variations.name: Merge specific analysis with metadata
variations.example:
anomaly_pipe = AnomalyPipe.from_dataframe(data)
anomaly_pipe = anomaly_pipe | detect_contextual_anomalies('sales', 'date', 'residual', 'sarimax')
merged_df = anomaly_pipe.merge_to_df(original_data, analysis_name='contextual_anomalies_residual_sarimax', include_metadata=True)

description: Get list of anomaly detection columns

variations.name: Get columns from last analysis
variations.example:
anomaly_pipe = AnomalyPipe.from_dataframe(data)
anomaly_pipe = anomaly_pipe | detect_statistical_outliers('temperature', 'zscore', 3.0)
anomaly_columns = anomaly_pipe.get_anomaly_columns()

variations.name: Get columns from specific analysis
variations.example:
anomaly_pipe = AnomalyPipe.from_dataframe(data)
anomaly_pipe = anomaly_pipe | detect_contextual_anomalies('sales', 'date', 'residual', 'sarimax')
anomaly_columns = anomaly_pipe.get_anomaly_columns(analysis_name='contextual_anomalies_residual_sarimax')

variations.name: Get summary DataFrame from last analysis
variations.example:
anomaly_pipe = AnomalyPipe.from_dataframe(data)
anomaly_pipe = anomaly_pipe | detect_statistical_outliers('temperature', 'zscore', 3.0)
summary_df = anomaly_pipe.get_anomaly_summary_df()

variations.name: Get summary DataFrame from specific analysis
variations.example:
anomaly_pipe = AnomalyPipe.from_dataframe(data)
anomaly_pipe = anomaly_pipe | detect_contextual_anomalies('sales', 'date', 'residual', 'sarimax')
summary_df = anomaly_pipe.get_anomaly_summary_df(analysis_name='contextual_anomalies_residual_sarimax')

description: Get overall summary of anomaly detection pipeline

variations.name: Get overall pipeline summary
variations.example:
anomaly_pipe = AnomalyPipe.from_dataframe(data)
anomaly_pipe = anomaly_pipe | detect_statistical_outliers('temperature', 'zscore', 3.0)
summary = anomaly_pipe.get_summary()

variations.name: Get summary for specific analysis
variations.example:
anomaly_pipe = AnomalyPipe.from_dataframe(data)
anomaly_pipe = anomaly_pipe | detect_contextual_anomalies('sales', 'date', 'residual', 'sarimax')
summary = anomaly_pipe.get_summary(analysis_name='contextual_anomalies_residual_sarimax')
